name: Global Payments Inc.
description: Global Payments Inc. is a leading payments technology company that delivers innovative software and services to businesses globally. The company provides a broad range of products and services that enable merchants to accept card, electronic, and digital payments across various channels, including in-person, online, and mobile. Headquartered in Georgia, United States, Global Payments operates in dozens of countries across North America, Europe, the Asia-Pacific region, and Latin America, helping businesses of all sizes streamline their payment processing and financial operations.
